domain_archetypes.name: mindset evidence replay
domain_archetypes.trigger: mindset signal changes while pitch context is stale
domain_archetypes.expected: block release until cited evidence is regenerated

domain_archetypes.name: pitch boundary probe
domain_archetypes.trigger: pitch handoff crosses a policy or trust boundary
domain_archetypes.expected: route to reviewer with evidence packet

domain_archetypes.name: evolution regression harness
domain_archetypes.trigger: evolution behavior regresses against the last accepted fixture
domain_archetypes.expected: open a regression issue with trace and benchmark delta

domain_archetypes.name: hypnotherapy operator packet
domain_archetypes.trigger: hypnotherapy output needs a human-readable audit packet
domain_archetypes.expected: accept only if decision claims cite fixture evidence
